channel.title: Pages on Thong Nguyen
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Thong Nguyen

item.title: About
item.description: I am a full-stack software developer with 6+ years of experience in various projects for top outsourcing companies in Vietnam as well as start-up companies. My work involves all aspects of the software development life cycle, applying my expertise in OOP and MVC principles. I built dynamic websites with user-focused and responsive, mobile-first design and development. I sharpen my skill set everyday and help others to grow along the way.
